text: Brz dogovor, odmah dobili termin za pregled, brzo resen problem. Preporuka 👍🏻 …
Получил оперативную помощь в воскресенье. Врач очень позитивный и профессиональный!

Komplimenti za uslugu koju pružate!
Compliments for the servise you provide!

I’ve had a great experience with this medical practice! I’ve experienced an ear infection on my trip, and they were very quick to respond. I’ve had a doctor visit very next day and during weekend. Best service I’ve ever experienced on any trip!
Najbolji ste super osoblje i doktori sve za desetku
Divni, profesionalni ljudi.. Zakazali su nam pregled u roku od 15 minuta od kada smo se javili i redovno su proveravali kako je beba. Zaista svaka preporuka
Тільки позитивні враження. Уважний персонал, кваліфікований лікар. Рекомендуємо.
Prezadovoljni smo podrškom i uslugama,sve preporuke!
Svaka pohvala za brzu organizaciju pregleda  i divnog pedijatra  Safera.

Thank you very much for your professionalism! You arrived quickly, and Dr. Elena was very competent and pleasant. She speaks several languages! She prescribed medication that helped a lot and stayed in touch with us.I highly recommend this clinic
Быстро,оперативно оказали помощь.Приятный и отзывчивый персонал
Jedna divna doktorka Jelena sa ogromnim strpljenjem za nas. Hvala
Medical Vranes je u najbržem roku na zahtev Uniqa osiguranja obezbedio detetu kućnu posetu lekara, jer taj dan klinika nije radilo. Efikasni, ljubazni i brižni. Jako smo zadovoljni i zahvalni

Sve pohvale za brzu reakciju i pregled.
Pošto je dete bilo u pitanju, kontaktirali smo osiguranje, a medical Vranes su nas kontaktirali u roku od 5 min, i dogovorili smo pregled.
Zaista sve pohvale. 5⭐️
Professional team of doctors, who know multiple languages.
nice doctor, speaks English, prescribed medication, recommended what to do in the future. After the appointment, they asked how you were feeling. I recommend
Thank you.
Very hood personal
Satisfied with the politeness and attention of the personnel and qualification of the doctor I visited. Thank you so much.  I feel better now.
I had a really nice experience! The professionals was always worried about everything and make me feel comfortable
Љубазни, посвећени, стручни и све похвале за др Рашковић и сестру која ради са њом.

First I went to another medical Center not far and wasn’t happy with the way they talked to me and didn’t take me serious. Then I ended up at medical vranes - huge recommendation. Very competent doctor and they actually listen and try their best. Pharmacy next door for the medications. Great value for money as well.

Unkomplizierte und unmittelbare Hilfe. Ein Englisch sprechender Arzt wäre hilfreich gewesen. Das freundliche Hotelpersonal hat aber bei der Übersetzung geholfen. Es ist schön, im Urlaub zu wissen, dass einem auch in entfernten Ländern geholfen wird.

Srecna sam i zahvalana sto mogu iz licnog iskustva pohvaliti Medical Vranes team na brzini, efikasnosti, profesionalnosti, od prvog kontakta sa njima, do dolaska doktora na kucnu adresu, uspostavljanju dijagnoze i prepisivanju terapije. Hvala od srca jos jednom.
the doctors were really helpful and they have a great sense of how to treat the patients:)

I had a great experience! I applied for travel insurance, they quickly found a doctor and literally an hour after applying I was already leaving the doctor's office with a treatment plan and the necessary prescriptions! Fast and convenient!
We received professional and prompt medical care for our child — highly recommended without a doubt!
Zelo zadovoljna z obravnavo v Medical Vranes. Osebje je bilo prijazno, strokovno in korektno. Vse je potekalo hitro in brez zapletov. Hvala celotni ekipi za prijazen pristop in profesionalnost!
The doctor came to my home for an insurance visit and was very helpful — explained everything clearly, provided me with medication, and even came on a holiday. Thank you!

We were in Montenegro on holidays when our son got an infection. Medical Vranes helped us get a pediatrician appointment close to place where we started in just couple of hours. We are very pleased both with the doctor’s visit and assistance from Medical Vranes.
Nice, welcoming and fast service

I had a fantastic experience with this medical practice! From the moment I walked in, the staff was warm, professional, and incredibly helpful. The doctor took the time to really listen to my concerns and made me feel completely at ease. They also accepted my insurance, which made everything so much easier and stress-free. I’m grateful for the care I received and would highly recommend them to anyone looking for compassionate, quality healthcare.

Our not even 3 year old son unfortunatelly got fever and ear pain on our holiday in Durres and the visit at Dr. Nesida was a pleasant experience, she is a professional who likes kids. We're thankful for all the help. Maybe a bit hard to find, would appreciate more signs or more clear/visible signs.

Sjajna, ljubazna i ekspeditivna usluga.
Hvala!

Отлично и очень оперативно уже несколько раз организовывали жене и ребенку посещение врачами (ЛОРом и хирургом). Причем как в Белграде, так и в Суботице.Врачи отлично говорят по-английски и, по нашему мнению, были профессионалами своего дела. Очень рекомендую!
Great experience!

Very friendly personnel, modern equipment and no pain. Thanks!
Recommend

I got ill during my short trip to Belgrade and called my insurance company. Two hours later, the most attentive and reassuring doctor was at my hotel room. She helped me more than my gp at home would have done.

I was very pleased with the promptness of the assistance provided to me.
I applied through my insurance, and within half an hour the doctor was already at my home and examined me and prescribed treatment.

I am still continuing treatment and have good impressions.
Все четко, точно, доступно и понятно, записывали через страховую к местным врачам.
Спасибо! Всё было отлично.

I was in Tirana, Albania when I got sick. I had high fever and sore throat so I applied for medical help through travel insurance.
Medical Vranes responded very quickly and they kept assisting me via whatsapp through the whole process. They made me a doctors' appointment to my convinience (regarding the time and place). Dr Almida was great. She was super nice and pleasent, but the fact that she is an experienced doctor made me feel better immediately.
I got my prescriptions and later on by Medical Vranes I even got my doctors report translated to my native language. Overall my experience with Medical Vranes was excellent!

Potpuno zaslužena ocena! Bila sam na godišnjem odmoru u Albaniji gde mi je u toku noći (bio je vikend) pozlilo. Kontaktirala sam ih i doktorka Aliona je u roku od 15 minuta bila kod nas. Sve pohvale još jednom, ogromna preporuka i hvala puno! Faleminderit! 😄 …

Спасибо большое доктору Миленке Вранеш и менеджеру Алексу (извините,если что, так в Whatsapp). Благодарю от всей души за оперативную помощь и доброе отношение.
Дмитрий.
Медицинский центр понравился.Приветливый персонал,внимательные врачи.Удобно расположен,есть парковка.
Bardzo szybka i profesjonalna pomoc,mila atmosfera w gabinecie i przydał się rosyjski ze szkoły ... dziękuję!!!
Все отлично! По страховке помощь получили быстро.
Brzo i profesionalno!
Veoma dobra komunikacija i kroz sat vremena doktor je bio u kućnoj poseti.. svaka čast na brzini, profesionalnosti, znanju, posvećenosti i brizi.. sve pohvale..
